request.description: Creates order with 3 vehicles across 2 locations. AIS140+Mining tickets are created in BOTH order_vehicles AND ais140_tickets/mining_tickets tables with the SAME tracking_id. tracking_id auto-saved to {{tracking_id}}.

request.description: Returns [{ vin, ticket_no, status, certificate_file_names }]. Query by vin_no OR ticket_no.
Returns [{ vin, mining_ticket_no, status, certificate_file_names }]. Query by vin_no OR mining_ticket_no.
